summary: Research complete for Sub-PR 1.1.1. All 4 Lean files exist on local main and type-check. Upstream has Defs.lean with old and/or/impl constructors and NaturalDeduction/Basic.lean with 10 rules; local main has refactored bot/imp constructors and 5 rules. ChagrovZakharyaschev1997 exists in local references.bib but not upstream. Total diff estimate is ~292 lines across 6 files, well under 500-line limit. No downstream breakage risk since dependent files do not exist upstream. Implementation approach is straightforward file extraction from local main to a new branch off upstream/main.

artifacts.summary: Research report for Sub-PR 1.1.1 proposition refactor to Lukasiewicz convention
